nasb.text: Then the clans of Judah will say in their hearts, ‘A strong support for us are the inhabitants of Jerusalem through the Lord of hosts, their God.’

esv.text: Then the clans of Judah shall say to themselves, ‘The inhabitants of Jerusalem have strength through the Lord of hosts, their God.’

cnv.text: 那時，猶大的族長必心裡說：‘耶路撒冷的居民，靠萬軍之耶和華他們的　神得著力量。’

ccb.text: 那时，犹大的族长必心里说，‘耶路撒冷的居民从他们的上帝——万军之耶和华那里得到了力量。’
